description:
Advances: specled.config, specled.implementation_tier

## Context

specled_-q59.9 wired the realization orchestrator into mix spec.check via SpecLedEx.BranchCheck.run_realization/3, but tier selection is hardcoded: branch_check.ex calls Orchestrator.run_with_attestations/2 without :enabled_tiers, so the orchestrator falls back to @default_tiers, which excludes :implementation. SpecLedEx.Config.Realization is still the v1 placeholder — defstruct enabled_tiers: [:api_boundary], and parse/1 has zero callers in lib/. Net effect: a consumer cannot enable the implementation tier at all; a realization: section in .spec/config.yml parses to nowhere and silently does nothing.

Motivating consumer: Atlas wants realization: enabled_tiers: [api_boundary, implementation] so implementation-closure drift detection runs against its 157 subjects.

## Deliverable

1. Load the realization: section from .spec/config.yml through SpecLedEx.Config.Realization.parse/1 wherever workspace config is loaded.
2. Thread enabled_tiers into the orchestrator opts in BranchCheck.run_realization/3.
3. Decide the absent-config default deliberately: Config.Realization defaults to [:api_boundary] while the orchestrator @default_tiers is [api_boundary, expanded_behavior, typespecs, use]. Absent config must preserve current spec.check behavior (the orchestrator default), not silently shrink the tier set to api_boundary only.
4. Surface rejected tier names as diagnostics (parse/1 already returns them — do not drop).
5. Docs: config.yml example + moduledoc update removing the placeholder language.

## Verification

- Tagged test: config.yml with enabled_tiers including implementation causes the implementation tier to run (observable via findings or hash commits); absent section preserves the pre-change tier set.
- mix spec.check green; update the specled.config spec with the new requirement.

comments.text: Superseded by epic specled_-s65 (S1: specled_-s65.1, S2: specled_-s65.2), distilled from mini-plan think-q2h. All deliverables carried over; S2 additionally advances specled.branch_guard.

title: Wire realization.enabled_tiers from .spec/config.yml into the orchestrator
